allow: PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/login -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "STATUS 200"; if\($r.Content -match "AEGIS"\){Write-Output "Found AEGIS in HTML"}; if\($r.Content -match "command center"\){Write-Output "Found tagline"}; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "Server not responding yet" })

PowerShell(foreach\($p in @\("/","/goals","/journal","/calendar","/fitness"\)\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$p -> ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Write-Output "dev server stopped")
